interface.longDescription:
Turn any text into natural speech with premium celebrity voices.

Upload PDFs, paste articles, or listen to ChatGPT's responses read aloud with word-by-word highlighting. Choose from 50+ voices including Snoop Dogg, Gwyneth Paltrow, and MrBeast. Adjust speed to match your pace.

Ideal for studying, accessibility, and hands-free learning across web, iOS, and Android.
defaultPrompt: Summarize chapter 1 of this PDF and read it out to me
